roles.name: image-admin
roles.description: Full access: approve, publish, rollback, manage roles, vendors, instructions, policy

roles.name: image-reviewer
roles.description: Review STAGING, approve PRODUCTION, approve AI-suggested instruction/script changes

roles.name: image-maintainer
roles.description: Run updates manually, trigger tests, manage candidates, propose script/instruction changes

roles.name: image-automation
roles.description: CI/CD service account: run scheduled discovery and weekly cycle, create candidates, execute tests

roles.name: image-editor
roles.description: Edit vendor definitions, installation instructions, update procedures (subject to approval)

roles.name: image-viewer
roles.description: Read-only: status, test results, image history, source definitions, approved instructions
